MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF BAN-JACKSON INVESTMENTS LLC's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance And Writ Of Attachment, And Request For Judicial Notice is off calendar. Request for dismissal filed 9/16/10. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)

Plaintiff Bin-Jackson Investments, Llc'S Ex Parte Applicaton For Right To Attach Order As To Sparkplay Media, Inc. (2 Bank Accounts)
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: CHRIS L. NORRIS, ESQ. for BAN-JACKSON, plaintiff and moving party; no other appearance.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
Plaintiff Ban-Jackson Investments, LLC's Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied as the court does not find good cause to grant the application without notice. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
